scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && node scripts/checkBundleBudget.mjs
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run tests/components/baseTile.test.ts tests/components/emptyState.test.ts tests/components/inlineError.test.ts tests/components/menuTile.test.ts tests/components/navBar.test.ts tests/components/pagination.test.ts tests/components/passwordInput.test.ts tests/components/passwordStrengthMeter.test.ts tests/components/upcomingEventCard.test.ts tests/unit --coverage --reporter=dot --reporter=hanging-process --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:integration: vitest run tests/views tests/components/adminSportsCalendar.a11y.test.ts tests/components/refereeClosingDocumentsManager.test.ts tests/components/usersFilterModal.test.ts tests/composables tests/utils --reporter=dot --reporter=hanging-process --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --no-file-parallelism --teardownTimeout=100
